queries: ("Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Lung Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Prostatic Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR ((breast OR lung OR pulmonary OR prostate OR prostatic) AND (cancer* OR neoplasm* OR carcinoma* OR tumor* OR tumour*))) AND (("federated learning"[tiab] OR "cross-silo"[tiab] OR "horizontal federated"[tiab] OR "vertical federated"[tiab] OR "split learning"[tiab] OR "distributed learning"[tiab] OR "decentralized learning"[tiab] OR "decentralised learning"[tiab] OR "collaborative learning"[tiab] OR "federated averaging"[tiab] OR (("privacy-preserving"[tiab] OR "privacy preserving"[tiab]) AND ("machine learning"[tiab] OR "deep learning"[tiab] OR "artificial intelligence"[tiab] OR AI[tiab]))))

(("Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Lung Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Prostatic Neoplasms"[Mesh]) AND ("Artificial Intelligence"[Mesh] OR "Machine Learning"[Mesh] OR "Deep Learning"[Mesh] OR "Neural Networks, Computer"[Mesh])) AND ("federated learning"[tiab] OR "distributed learning"[tiab] OR "decentralized learning"[tiab] OR "decentralised learning"[tiab] OR "split learning"[tiab] OR "collaborative learning"[tiab] OR (("privacy-preserving"[tiab] OR "privacy preserving"[tiab]) AND ("machine learning"[tiab] OR "deep learning"[tiab] OR "artificial intelligence"[tiab]))) AND ("Multicenter Study"[Publication Type] OR "Multicenter Studies as Topic"[Mesh] OR "Cohort Studies"[Mesh] OR "Prospective Studies"[Mesh] OR "Retrospective Studies"[Mesh] OR "Validation Study"[Publication Type] OR "Comparative Study"[Publication Type] OR "Evaluation Study"[Publication Type] OR "Randomized Controlled Trial"[Publication Type])

(((cancer*[tiab] OR neoplasm*[tiab] OR oncolog*[tiab] OR carcinoma*[tiab] OR tumor*[tiab] OR tumour*[tiab]) AND (breast[tiab] OR lung[tiab] OR pulmonary[tiab] OR prostate[tiab] OR prostatic[tiab])) AND ("federated learning"[tiab] OR "collaborative learning"[tiab] OR "distributed learning"[tiab] OR "decentralized learning"[tiab] OR "decentralised learning"[tiab] OR "split learning"[tiab] OR "privacy-preserving machine learning"[tiab] OR "privacy preserving machine learning"[tiab])) AND (diagnos*[tiab] OR detect*[tiab] OR screen*[tiab] OR classif*[tiab] OR predict*[tiab] OR prognos*[tiab] OR "precision medicine"[tiab] OR "personalized medicine"[tiab] OR "personalised medicine"[tiab] OR "clinical decision"[tiab] OR "clinical applicability"[tiab])

(("Breast Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Lung Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR "Prostatic Neoplasms"[Mesh] OR ((breast[tiab] OR lung[tiab] OR pulmonary[tiab] OR prostate[tiab] OR prostatic[tiab]) AND (cancer*[tiab] OR neoplasm*[tiab] OR carcinoma*[tiab] OR tumor*[tiab] OR tumour*[tiab]))) AND ("federated learning"[tiab] OR "cross-silo"[tiab] OR "horizontal federated"[tiab] OR "vertical federated"[tiab] OR "split learning"[tiab] OR "distributed learning"[tiab] OR "decentralized learning"[tiab] OR "decentralised learning"[tiab])) AND ((multicenter[tiab] OR "multi-center"[tiab] OR multicentre[tiab] OR "multi-centre"[tiab] OR "multi-institution*"[tiab] OR "cross-site"[tiab] OR "cross-center"[tiab] OR "multi-site"[tiab] OR "Multicenter Study"[Publication Type]) AND (generaliz*[tiab] OR generalis*[tiab] OR "external validation"[tiab] OR transportab*[tiab] OR heterogeneity[tiab] OR "domain shift"[tiab] OR robustness[tiab]))

inclusion_criteria: Empirical studies that implement federated (or equivalent privacy-preserving distributed) learning to train machine learning models using multi-centre data for breast, lung, or prostate cancer (real multi-institution cohorts or realistic multi-site simulations).

Evaluate outcomes relevant to cancer detection, diagnosis, or precision medicine and report quantitative model performance (e.g., generalizability across sites, diagnostic accuracy, calibration, clinical applicability).
Include a comparator to centralized or single-centre training, or conduct cross-site external validation to assess generalizability.
exclusion_criteria: Studies that use only centralized or single-centre training without a federated/distributed learning component.
Populations not involving breast, lung, or prostate cancer, or mixed-cancer studies without separate analyses for these cancers.
Studies focused solely on nonclinical tasks (e.g., workflow/operations) or that do not report performance on detection, diagnosis, or precision medicine outcomes.
Non-empirical publications (reviews, editorials, perspectives) or methods-only papers without application and evaluation on multi-centre cancer data.
screening_criteria.description: Single-layer screening to identify empirical multi-centre oncology studies applying federated learning for breast, lung, or prostate cancer that report quantitative performance on detection/diagnosis/precision-medicine outcomes and compare against centralized or single-site approaches or assess cross-site generalizability.

included_articles.title: Federated Learning with Research Prototypes: Application to Multi-Center MRI-based Detection of Prostate Cancer with Diverse Histopathology.
Optimizing Federated Learning Configurations for MRI Prostate Segmentation and Cancer Detection: A Simulation Study.
Risk stratification for early-stage NSCLC progression: a federated learning framework with large-small model synergy.
FAME: A privacy-preserving dual-stage deep learning framework for breast ultrasound imaging using federated transfer and synthetic learning.
Enhancing breast magnetic resonance imaging segmentation with a federated semi-supervised approach.
Federated learning for predicting histological response to neoadjuvant chemotherapy in triple-negative breast cancer.
